speaker: Draymond Green
prediction_text: The New York Knicks will beat the Cleveland Cavaliers in six games in the conference finals.
argument: Matchup fit: New York is built to defend and attack Cleveland with multiple perimeter options; Big-man spacing: Karl-Anthony Towns can pull Jarrett Allen and Evan Mobley away from the rim and open the floor; Momentum: The Knicks have found a strong playoff rhythm and are playing incredible basketball.

speaker: Draymond Green
prediction_text: The Oklahoma City Thunder will beat the San Antonio Spurs in the conference finals.
argument: Championship edge: Oklahoma City being the champs makes the regular-season matchup less decisive once the playoffs start; Jalen Williams return: Getting J-Dub back gives the Thunder the secondary downhill creator they need against Victor Wembanyama; Defensive versatility: J-Dub gives Oklahoma City another smaller option to defend Wembanyama if needed.
